response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the video: It is a merchandise announcement video by the VTuber IRyS. 2. Monitored for vocal music throughout the video. 3. Confirmed that only background instrumental music is present, and there is no singing (vocal music). 4. Therefore, no song metadata or lyrics were identified. 5. Segmented the video based on the topics presented by IRyS.
response.global_summary: An announcement video where the VTuber IRyS introduces several items of her birthday merchandise, including an acrylic stand, tote bag, keychain, and a pouch, and explains the bonus items available for set purchases. There is no vocal music in this video.

scenes.description: IRyS introduces merchandise items: an acrylic stand, a tote bag, a keychain, and a pouch. No vocal music is playing.
IRyS introduces the bonus postcards for set purchases. No vocal music is playing.
IRyS concludes the announcement and waves. No vocal music is playing.
